Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Class WebViewShellExperience

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora.Shell
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Runtime.dll

Opt-in runtime helper that wires common host policies (new window, downloads, permissions) onto an IWebView instance.

public sealed class WebViewShellExperience : IDisposable
Inheritance
object
WebViewShellExperience
Implements
IDisposable
Inherited Members

object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()

object.ToString()

Constructors

WebViewShellExperience(IWebView, WebViewShellExperienceOptions?)

Creates a new shell experience instance for the given WebView.

public WebViewShellExperience(IWebView webView, WebViewShellExperienceOptions? options = null)

Parameters

webView IWebView
options WebViewShellExperienceOptions

Properties

EffectiveMenuModel

Current effective menu model after pruning and successful application.

public WebViewMenuModelRequest? EffectiveMenuModel { get; }

Property Value

WebViewMenuModelRequest

ManagedWindowCount

Number of managed windows currently tracked by runtime.

public int ManagedWindowCount { get; }

Property Value

int

RootProfileIdentity

Gets root profile identity when profile resolver is configured.

public string? RootProfileIdentity { get; }

Property Value

string

RootWindowId

Stable identity of the root window associated with this shell experience.

public Guid RootWindowId { get; }

Property Value

Guid

SessionDecision

Gets the session decision resolved at construction time when SessionPolicy is configured.

public WebViewShellSessionDecision? SessionDecision { get; }

Property Value

WebViewShellSessionDecision

Methods

ApplyMenuModel(WebViewMenuModelRequest)

Applies host app menu model via typed capability bridge. Reports deterministic policy failures for deny/failure outcomes.

public WebViewHostCapabilityCallResult<object?> ApplyMenuModel(WebViewMenuModelRequest request)

Parameters

request WebViewMenuModelRequest

Returns

WebViewHostCapabilityCallResult<object>

CloseDevToolsAsync()

Closes DevTools through shell policy governance. Returns false when blocked by policy or when execution fails.

public Task<bool> CloseDevToolsAsync()

Returns

Task<bool>

CloseManagedWindowAsync(Guid, TimeSpan?, CancellationToken)

Closes a managed window by id and waits for bounded teardown completion.

public Task<bool> CloseManagedWindowAsync(Guid windowId, TimeSpan? timeout = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

Parameters

windowId Guid
timeout TimeSpan?
cancellationToken CancellationToken

Returns

Task<bool>

Dispose()

Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

public void Dispose()

ExecuteCommandAsync(WebViewCommand)

Executes a standard command through shell policy governance. Returns false when blocked, unsupported, or execution fails.

public Task<bool> ExecuteCommandAsync(WebViewCommand command)

Parameters

command WebViewCommand

Returns

Task<bool>

ExecuteSystemAction(WebViewSystemActionRequest)

Executes host system action via typed capability bridge. Reports deterministic policy failures for deny/failure outcomes.

public WebViewHostCapabilityCallResult<object?> ExecuteSystemAction(WebViewSystemActionRequest request)

Parameters

request WebViewSystemActionRequest

Returns

WebViewHostCapabilityCallResult<object>

GetManagedWindowIds()

Returns a snapshot of active managed window ids.

public IReadOnlyList<Guid> GetManagedWindowIds()

Returns

IReadOnlyList<Guid>

IsDevToolsOpenAsync()

Queries DevTools open state through shell policy governance. Returns false when blocked by policy or when execution fails.

public Task<bool> IsDevToolsOpenAsync()

Returns

Task<bool>

OpenDevToolsAsync()

Opens DevTools through shell policy governance. Returns false when blocked by policy or when execution fails.

public Task<bool> OpenDevToolsAsync()

Returns

Task<bool>

PublishSystemIntegrationEvent(WebViewSystemIntegrationEventRequest)

Publishes a host-originated system integration event through typed capability governance.

public WebViewHostCapabilityCallResult<WebViewSystemIntegrationEventRequest> PublishSystemIntegrationEvent(WebViewSystemIntegrationEventRequest request)

Parameters

request WebViewSystemIntegrationEventRequest

Returns

WebViewHostCapabilityCallResult<WebViewSystemIntegrationEventRequest>

ReadClipboardText()

Reads host clipboard text via typed capability bridge. Returns denied result when bridge is not configured.

public WebViewHostCapabilityCallResult<string?> ReadClipboardText()

Returns

WebViewHostCapabilityCallResult<string>

ShowNotification(WebViewNotificationRequest)

Shows host notification via typed capability bridge. Returns denied result when bridge is not configured.

public WebViewHostCapabilityCallResult<object?> ShowNotification(WebViewNotificationRequest request)

Parameters

request WebViewNotificationRequest

Returns

WebViewHostCapabilityCallResult<object>

ShowOpenFileDialog(WebViewOpenFileDialogRequest)

Shows host open-file dialog via typed capability bridge. Returns denied result when bridge is not configured.

public WebViewHostCapabilityCallResult<WebViewFileDialogResult> ShowOpenFileDialog(WebViewOpenFileDialogRequest request)

Parameters

request WebViewOpenFileDialogRequest

Returns

WebViewHostCapabilityCallResult<WebViewFileDialogResult>

ShowSaveFileDialog(WebViewSaveFileDialogRequest)

Shows host save-file dialog via typed capability bridge. Returns denied result when bridge is not configured.

public WebViewHostCapabilityCallResult<WebViewFileDialogResult> ShowSaveFileDialog(WebViewSaveFileDialogRequest request)

Parameters

request WebViewSaveFileDialogRequest

Returns

WebViewHostCapabilityCallResult<WebViewFileDialogResult>

Attempts to get a managed child window by id.

windowId Guid
managedWindow IWebView

Returns

bool

UpdateTrayState(WebViewTrayStateRequest)

Updates host tray state via typed capability bridge. Reports deterministic policy failures for deny/failure outcomes.

Parameters

request WebViewTrayStateRequest

Returns

WebViewHostCapabilityCallResult<object>

WriteClipboardText(string)

Writes host clipboard text via typed capability bridge. Returns denied result when bridge is not configured.

public WebViewHostCapabilityCallResult<object?> WriteClipboardText(string text)

Parameters

text string

Returns

WebViewHostCapabilityCallResult<object>

Events

ManagedWindowLifecycleChanged

Raised whenever a managed window lifecycle state changes.

public event EventHandler<WebViewManagedWindowLifecycleEventArgs>? ManagedWindowLifecycleChanged

Event Type

EventHandler<WebViewManagedWindowLifecycleEventArgs>

PolicyError

Raised when policy execution fails in any shell domain.

public event EventHandler<WebViewShellPolicyErrorEventArgs>? PolicyError

Event Type

EventHandler<WebViewShellPolicyErrorEventArgs>

SessionPermissionProfileEvaluated

Raised when profile resolution/evaluation completes for session or permission paths.

public event EventHandler<WebViewSessionPermissionProfileDiagnosticEventArgs>? SessionPermissionProfileEvaluated

Event Type

EventHandler<WebViewSessionPermissionProfileDiagnosticEventArgs>

SystemIntegrationEventReceived

Raised when an inbound system integration event is delivered through shell governance.

public event EventHandler<WebViewSystemIntegrationEventRequest>? SystemIntegrationEventReceived

Event Type

EventHandler<WebViewSystemIntegrationEventRequest>
